calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Jane Beylin, Esq. for Plaintiff: University of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's witness: Davind Landry, present, was sworn and examined.
Richard Jolliffe, Esq. for Defendant: Latrice W. Ward, also present, Declaration of counsel in opposition to Plaintiff's request for entry of court judgment pursuant to stipulation is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Latrice W. Ward as follows:
Principal $3,350.00
Prejudgment Interest $818.91
Attorney's Fees $5,206.00
Costs $131.00 for a total of $9,505.91
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Continued To Oct-26-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: MATTER COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE, AFTER BEING ASSIGNED FROM DEPT. 206. PLTF AND COUNSEL ARE PRESENT. PLTF NOT SWORN AND EXAMINED; COURT AND COUNSEL ENGAGE IN COLLOQUY REGARDING THE CASE AND THE CASE HISTORY. COURT ADVISES THAT AT THIS TIME, THE MATTER WILL BE DROPPED FROM THE CALENDAR. AND, THAT PLTF CSL SHOULD START ALL OVER AGAIN AND SERVE THE PROPPER PERSONS.THEN THE CASE CAN GO FORWARD.MATTER DROPPED WITH PREJUDICE.PLTF CSL:JANE BEYLIN,ESQ.
JUDGE GERALD RAGAN; CLERK-BB SURRATT;REPORTER-TINA PAXTON; (DEPT. 505)
